notes: UN News, 'Hold the caviar: UN-backed body bans export of most endangered sturgeon', 8 April 2006, reporting a CITES Secretariat announcement
column7: Iran's quota alone, out of a combined 2006 global total of 53,000 kg authorized for Iran, Bulgaria (4,600 kg), China (2,300 kg) and Romania (1,800 kg) after CITES suspended Beluga (Huso huso) caviar exports for most Caspian/Black Sea range states pending stock-assessment compliance. Directly fetched and confirmed.
